meta.title: TV PPTX Viewer – PPTX Presentation Viewer for Android TV
meta.description: TV PPTX Viewer is an Android TV app for opening, importing, viewing, searching, bookmarking, and presenting PPTX files on your TV with remote-friendly controls.
meta.keywords: TV PPTX Viewer, Android TV PPTX viewer, PPTX viewer for TV, PPTX viewer Android TV, PPTX presenter Android TV, view PPTX on TV, open PPTX on Android TV, presentation viewer for Android TV, PPTX bookmarks, PPTX search, PPTX slideshow TV, web import PPTX, WiFi upload PPTX, FTP upload PPTX, USB PPTX viewer TV
meta.author: Deepak PK

og.title: TV PPTX Viewer for Android TV
og.description: Open, import, search, bookmark, and present PPTX files on Android TV with a remote-friendly PPTX viewer.

twitter.title: TV PPTX Viewer for Android TV
twitter.description: A remote-friendly Android TV app to open, import, search, bookmark, and present PPTX files on the big screen.

product.name: TV PPTX Viewer
product.heroTitle: TV PPTX Viewer – PPTX Presentations on Android TV
product.heroDescription: Open PPTX PPTX files on your Android TV with a clean, remote-friendly interface. Import presentations using Web Import, WiFi Upload, FTP, or USB, then view slides with zoom, bookmarks, search, night mode, animation mode, and resume support.

features.title: Features Built for Android TV Presentations

cards.title: Made for Android TV
bullets: Designed around Android TV development principles
Remote-friendly navigation with clear focus behavior
Open PPTX files directly from the TV home listing
Landscape-first experience for big screens

cards.title: PPTX File Library
bullets: PPTX grid/list items show thumbnail and file name
Long-press OK on a PPTX to view file options
View file name, location, size, and last modified date
Open or delete imported PPTX files from file options

cards.title: Easy PPTX Imports
bullets: Import PPTX files using Web Import, WiFi Upload, or FTP
Web Import uses a token and works even outside the same network
WiFi Upload is faster when both devices are on the same network
FTP import supports anonymous FTP on the same network

cards.title: QR Code Connection
bullets: Web Import page shows a QR code for quick connection
FTP import page shows a QR code for easy setup
Send presentations from phone, laptop, or another device
No typing long TV URLs when QR scanning is available

cards.title: Powerful PPTX Viewer
bullets: Open PPTX files from the home page with the OK button
Resume last viewed slide number automatically
Restore last used zoom and night mode settings
Presentation options appear as an overlay on the current slide

cards.title: Search & Go To Slide
bullets: Search text inside PPTX files
Jump directly to a specific slide number
Restart presentation from the first slide
Toggle slide/page info visibility while viewing

cards.title: Bookmarks Across PPTXs
bullets: Bookmark the current slide from the viewer options menu
View all bookmarks across all PPTX files
Bookmark items show slide thumbnail, page number, and PPTX title
Long-press a bookmark to delete it from the bookmarks page

cards.title: Viewer Controls Overlay
bullets: Zoom in, zoom out, and reset zoom
Toggle night mode while previewing the change live
Choose animation mode for presentation viewing
Close the overlay with the close option or Back button

cards.title: Settings & Storage Tools
bullets: View TV screen resolution and screen ratio
Check available storage and total PPTX file count
View bookmark count, thumbnail count, and storage usage
Clear imported PPTXs, bookmarks, and thumbnails from settings

cards.title: Help, Support & App Info
bullets: Built-in Help/FAQ page for common questions
About page with developer details
Version info menu item for quick app version checking
Support and feedback page with QR codes for useful links

items.title: Classrooms & Training
items.text: Show lesson slides, training material, and study presentations on a TV without needing a computer connected all the time.

items.title: Office Presentations
items.text: Open business PPTX files on meeting-room TVs with quick import options and remote-friendly navigation.

items.title: Home & Personal Use
items.text: View school projects, event slides, photo presentations, or saved PPTX files directly on Android TV.

items.title: Simple Display Use
items.text: Use PPTX slides for lightweight information display where easy import, viewing, and slide navigation matter.

items.q: What is TV PPTX Viewer?
items.a: TV PPTX Viewer is an Android TV app for opening and viewing PPTX PPTX files on a TV using a remote-friendly interface.

items.q: How can I add PPTX files to the app?
items.a: You can import PPTX files using Web Import, WiFi Upload, FTP Import, or by scanning available PPTX files from connected storage such as USB.

items.q: Does Web Import require the phone or laptop to be on the same WiFi network as the TV?
items.a: No. Web Import uses a token-based flow, so the sending device does not need to be on the same network as the TV.

items.q: When should I use WiFi Upload instead of Web Import?
items.a: Use WiFi Upload when your sending device and Android TV are on the same network. It is designed for faster local file transfer.

items.q: Does FTP Import need the same network?
items.a: Yes. FTP Import uses an anonymous FTP connection and requires the sending device to be on the same network as the TV.

items.q: Can I bookmark slides?
items.a: Yes. You can bookmark the current slide, view bookmarks for the current PPTX, and also browse bookmarks across all PPTX files.

items.q: Does the app remember where I stopped?
items.a: Yes. The viewer can reopen a PPTX with the last viewed slide number and last used view settings such as zoom and night mode.

items.q: Can I search inside PPTX files?
items.a: Yes. The viewer includes a search option to find text inside supported PPTX files.

items.q: Can I delete imported PPTX files?
items.a: Yes. Long-press OK on a focused PPTX file to view file info and options such as open and delete. Settings also include an option to clear all PPTXs in the imports folder. USB files are not deleted.

items.q: Where can I manage subscription information?
items.a: The app includes a subscribe page and a manage subscription page with information about managing your subscription.

howItWorks.title: Start Presenting on TV in Minutes

steps.title: Install TV PPTX Viewer
steps.text: Install TV PPTX Viewer on your Android TV or Fire TV device.

steps.title: Import or Scan PPTX Files
steps.text: Add files with Web Import, WiFi Upload, FTP Import, or reload/scan PPTX files from available storage.

steps.title: Open and Control Slides
steps.text: Select a PPTX with the OK button, then use the overlay menu for zoom, bookmarks, search, go to slide, night mode, animation mode, and restart.

features.title: Why TV Users Will Like It

cards.title: TV-First Experience
bullets: Built for Android TV usage and remote control navigation
Large-screen friendly PPTX browsing with thumbnails and file names

cards.title: Flexible Import Options
bullets: Web Import with token support for remote uploads
Fast WiFi Upload and anonymous FTP for same-network transfers

cards.title: Presentation Controls
bullets: Zoom, reset zoom, night mode, animation mode, and slide info toggle
Bookmarks, search, go to slide, and restart options inside the viewer

cards.title: Useful App Tools
bullets: Settings show resolution, screen ratio, storage, file counts, bookmarks, and thumbnail usage
Clear imported files, bookmarks, and thumbnails when needed
